name: Ellies Holdings Limited
summary: Ellies Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the manufacture, import, wholesale, and distribution of LED lighting, electrical, and electronic products and solutions to the residential and commercial sectors in South Africa, Botswana, Namibia, and Swaziland. It operates in two segments, Trading and Distribution and Manufacturing. The company provides aerial and satellite television equipment, accessories and hardware, photovoltaic solar panels, and cable and fiber distribution networks, as well as signal, sound, and audio-visual solutions in the business sector. It also develops, manufactures, and sells terrestrial antennae; and light metal products, such as wall brackets, shelving, satellite and terrestrial mounting brackets, and satellite dishes, as well as LED and plasma TV mounts. In addition, the company offers wizard remote blaster and video senders; and vacuum and plastic blister packaging products. Ellies Holdings Limited was founded in 1979 and is based in Sandton, South Africa.
